creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
Fetching the tclreadline-2.1.0.tar.gz from the master site gives
a checksum error. compilation seems to work. Maybe another tarball
on the master-site ? 
Maybe someone who has the old tarball laying around can compare
it with the new tarball and check it.

How-To-Repeat: Try a make checksum without the file :-).
